title: Author canonical pheno-tracing Rust crate
author: forge
summary: Authored the canonical pheno-tracing workspace crate consolidating the tracing-subscriber + EnvFilter + tracing-appender init pattern into a one-liner: pheno_tracing::init().
idempotency: All three init paths use tracing_subscriber::fmt::try_init (TryInit), so repeated calls in a process are no-ops after the first success.
consolidation_targets: crates/focus-observability (replaced by pheno_tracing::init_json + tracing::info! calls in handlers)
notes: Replaces ad-hoc tracing setup patterns duplicated across focus-observability and focus-telemetry. Uses try_init for process-level idempotency. All three modes read RUST_LOG via EnvFilter; default level is INFO when RUST_LOG is unset. The file writer uses tracing_appender::rolling::daily for automatic daily rotation.
no_touch: Other L3 tasks (L3-#46, L3-#48, L3-#49, etc.)
focus-observability crate (will be migrated in a follow-up L3 task)
focus-telemetry crate (will be migrated in a follow-up L3 task)
